feed.title: App Store Discounts（HK）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:67474973430475776+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008141708743680+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 欢迎订阅 App Store Discounts
entry.summary: 感谢您订阅我们的 RSS 源，我们是一个致力于为全球用户带来 App Store 最新折扣信息的社区驱动项目。我们的目标是让每一位用户都能第一时间掌握心爱应用的优惠动态，无论是应用本身的价格下调，还是内购项目的限时促销，我们都将为您一网打尽！
entry.content:
感谢您订阅我们的 RSS 源，我们是一个致力于为全球用户带来 App Store 最新折扣信息的社区驱动项目。我们的目标是让每一位用户都能第一时间掌握心爱应用的优惠动态，无论是应用本身的价格下调，还是内购项目的限时促销，我们都将为您一网打尽！

关于我们的 RSS 源

  • 专注于推送 App Store 应用的优惠信息
  • 只要应用价格降低或内购项降价，我们就会及时推送
  • 每个应用的优惠信息以单独的 feed 形式呈现
  • RSS 源完全开源，您可以随时查看、贡献和添加您关注的应用

找到我们

App Store Discounts

最后

如果本项目对你有帮助，请帮我们点个 ⭐️ 可好

entry.title: 统计数据报告
entry.content:
追踪的国家或地区

  1. 中国大陆(CN)
  2. 中国香港(HK)
  3. 中国澳门(MO)
  4. 中国台湾(TW)
  5. 美国(US)
  6. 土耳其(TR)
  7. 葡萄牙(PT)

追踪的应用数量统计

类别 总应用 人为添加 自动添加 禁止推送
所有 1825 201 1624 79
HK 1704 179 1525 71

本月应用优惠次数排行(HK)

由于支持了根据付费应用排行榜自动添加追踪的应用，现目前大部分应用是自动添加的，应用的质量是未知不可控的，当前这个排行榜会作为后续禁用推送的一个参考

entry.title: Farming Simulator 20
entry.content:
优惠信息（价格：HK$ 48.00 → HK$ 18.00 [HK$ 18.00 ~ HK$ 48.00]）

全部价格信息

价格：HK$ 18.00

App 內購買

  • 1'000'000 Coins：HK$ 22.00
  • 500'000 Coins：HK$ 18.00
  • 200'000 Coins：HK$ 8.00

应用描述

"Farming Simulator 20 带您尽享精彩纷呈的农夫生活！您可以收割种类繁多的作物，照料猪、奶牛、绵羊等牲畜，新增的马匹可以让您跨上马背自由驰骋，用崭新的方式去探索农场周围的广袤土地。前往多变的市场出售农产品赚取金钱，可用于投资购买更多农业机械并扩建农场。 在 Farming Simulator 20 中，您可以拥有超过 100 种载具和工具，忠实再现行业内的知名品牌。移动平台首次迎来了全球排名前列的农业机械公司 John Deere，另外还有来自 CASE IH、New Holland、Challenger、Fendt、Massey Ferguson、Valtra、Krone Deutz-Fahr 等知名品牌的农机载具供您选用。 在 Farming Simulator 20 中，您可以在全新的北美风貌中开发、扩建农场，尽情享受丰富多彩的农业活动，其中包括新的农业机械及棉花、燕麦等作物。 Farming Simulator 20 的特点包括： • 使用超过 100 种来自全球各大知名农业机械制造商的真实载具和工具 • 种植并收割种类繁多的作物，包括小麦、大麦、燕麦、油菜、向日葵、大豆、玉米、土豆、甜菜、棉花 • 喂养奶牛、绵羊以生产、出售牛奶和羊毛 • 照料马匹并策马前去自由探索农场周围的世界 • 全新 3D 画质展现农业机械的更多细节和更细致的北美风貌 • 驾驶舱视角可让您在驾驶载具时拥有前所未有的真实体验"

应用截屏

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: This War of Mine
entry.content:
优惠信息（价格：HK$ 118.00 → HK$ 18.00 [HK$ 18.00 ~ HK$ 118.00]）

全部价格信息

价格：HK$ 18.00

App 內購買

  • The Little Ones：HK$ 18.00

应用描述

"If you've not already played this brilliant, heart-wrenching game, then mobile is as good a place as any to let it completely destroy you." - , 9/10, Pocket Gamer UK "This War of Mine isn’t exactly “fun,” but it’s definitely a game worth playing." , 9/10, 148apps "I'm really excited to go home and download 11 bit studios' title on my iPad" , Game Informer In This War Of Mine you do not play as an elite soldier, rather a group of civilians trying to survive in a besieged city; struggling with lack of food, medicine and constant danger from snipers and hostile scavengers. The game provides an experience of war seen from an entirely new angle. The pace of This War of Mine is imposed by the day and night cycle. During the day snipers outside stop you from leaving your refuge, so you need to focus on maintaining your hideout: crafting, trading and taking care of your survivors. At night, take one of your civilians on a mission to scavenge through a set of unique locations for items that will help you stay alive. Make life-and-death decisions driven by your conscience. Try to protect everybody from your shelter or sacrifice some of them for longer-term survival. During war, there are no good or bad decisions; there is only survival. The sooner you realize that, the better. This War of Mine: Anniversary Edition It's been two years since This War of Mine global release and we're still expanding the experience. This new free DLC, created especially for the Anniversary Edition, adds new characters, new locations to explore, and most importantly - a whole new ending, leading to a different outcome to the game. The dilemma though remains the same – how far will you go, to protect the ones you care about? Key Features: • Inspired by real-life events • Control your survivors and manage your shelter • Craft weapons, alcohol, beds or stoves – anything that helps you survive • Make decisions - an often unforgiving and emotionally difficult experience • Randomized world and characters every time you start a new game • Charcoal-stylized aesthetics to complement the game's theme This War of Mine experience is now broadened with "The Little Ones" expansion. "The Little Ones" explores the hardships of wartime survival as seen from an entirely new perspective―that of a child. This DLC puts you in charge of a group of adults and children stuck in a besieged city, struggling with basic necessities. TWoM: The Little Ones focuses not only on the reality of enduring war, but also on how even in times of conflict, kids are still kids: they laugh, cry, play, and see the world differently. In addition to thinking about survival, you'll have to summon your inner child to understand how to protect the little ones. Their youth, and their future, are in your hands. • Experience the biggest expansion to This War of Mine • Protect innocent children • Craft toys, play with kids, and be the caretaker they need • Meet new adult civilians in scenarios with children PLEASE NOTE: This game is optimized for latest devices. While playing on older devices such as iPhone 4s or iPad 2 you might experience lower frame rates.

应用截屏

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: LaxtTime
entry.content:
优惠信息

App 內購買

  • Premium Lifetime：HK$ 78.00 → HK$ 58.00 [HK$ 58.00 ~ HK$ 148.00]

全部价格信息

价格：免費

App 內購買

  • Premium Annual：HK$ 58.00
  • Premium Monthly：HK$ 8.00
  • Premium Lifetime：HK$ 58.00
  • Premium Lifetime-Early Bird：HK$ 148.00

应用描述

LaxtTime 是一個簡單易用的記錄應用程式，您可以用它來追蹤生活中的任何事情。 如果您的生活中有重複發生的事件，LaxtTime 是追蹤它們的完美工具。 #例如，您可以記錄 上次清潔廚房的時間 上次冥想的時間 上次運動、喝水、去購物的時間... LaxtTime 不僅準確記錄每個事件最後一次發生的時間，還會根據您設定的間隔自動提醒您。 它是您可靠的記憶助手，讓您可以專注於生活，無需擔心記住瑣碎的事情。 #功能 [記錄最後發生時間] LaxtTime 記錄每個事件最後發生的時間，精確到分鐘。 如果您經常無法記住某事最後發生的時間，LaxtTime 就是您可靠的助手。LaxtTime 為您記住一切，您無需操心。 [重複提醒] LaxtTime 只有一種提醒功能，即根據您設定的時間間隔重複提醒您。一旦您完成任務，提醒倒計時就會重置。 您也可以關閉提醒，只記錄最後發生時間。 設計簡單，提醒恰到好處。 [日程管理] LaxtTime 還提供簡單易用的日曆，幫助您管理日程。 [數據統計] LaxtTime 還具有強大的數據統計功能。您可以按週、月、年查看活動狀態，包括打卡天數、打卡次數、平均間隔等信息。 同時，LaxtTime 會幫您計算平均打卡次數和打卡時間，幫助您發現生活中的規律。 [靈活記錄] LaxtTime 支持記錄四種屬性：筆記、圖片、選項和數值。 您可以創建多個選項，例如選擇[跑步]、[划船]、[游泳]...來記錄每次鍛煉。 您也可以記錄每次跑步的距離，[3公里]、[4公里]... [簡潔界面] LaxtTime 擁有精心設計的淺色和深色主題配色方案，以及非常簡潔的界面，讓您快速獲取所需信息。 [豐富個性化] LaxtTime 提供數十種預設顏色，您還可以自定義顏色來標記您的記錄。 同時，LaxtTime 支持豐富的設置，讓您個性化使用體驗。 [實用小組件] 支持小組件打卡和倒計時顯示。 [熱力圖] 使用熱力圖了解您的活動模式。 [會員說明] 會員可以解鎖 LaxtTime 的所有付費功能，並享受未來高級功能的免費更新。 確認購買並付款後，您的 iTunes 帳戶將自動續訂訂閱。Apple iTunes 帳戶將在到期日前 24 小時內收取費用。付款成功後，訂閱期將延長一個訂閱週期。若要取消續訂，請在當前訂閱期結束前至少 24 小時手動在 iTunes/AppleID 設置中關閉自動續訂功能。在試用期內，如果 iTunes 帳戶未取消訂閱，將在試用期結束時自動開始訂閱並收費。購買訂閱後，任何未使用的試用期將被放棄。本服務允許您選擇是否取消；如果您選擇不取消，下一個計費週期的續訂服務將自動開始。 [隱私協議] (a) https://merciful-sugar-3e6.notion.site/Laxt-Time-Privacy-7b76083d34d545abb8a59efe25c001f7 (b) https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/ [服務協議] (a) https://merciful-sugar-3e6.notion.site/Terms-of-service-08c6aecd3d5b4e6f8c91adb04f770826?pvs=74

应用截屏

iPhone

entry.title: 倒計時應用 Countdown App
entry.content:
优惠信息（价格：HK$ 2.00 → 免費 [免費 ~ HK$ 18.00]）

全部价格信息

价格：免費

App 內購買

  • Countdown 2.0 Monthly：HK$ 18.00
  • Countdown 2.0 Lifetime：HK$ 38.00

应用描述

Your countdown awaits. Inspired by the horror movie Countdown, this app will reveal exactly how much time you have left. By receiving, opening the file package, and/or using Countdown('Software') containing this software, you agree that this End User License Agreement(EULA) is a legally binding and valid contract and agree to be bound by it. You agree to abide by the intellectual property laws and all of the terms and conditions of this Agreement. User shall accept the terms of his or her fate. Any attempt to use information derived from Countdown to alter the user’s fate will result in a breach of this agreement. Tag us in your reactions using #CountdownApp on TikTok. --- --- --- --- Warning: This app contains vibrations, sound effects, and uses your device’s torch for added intensity. It may not be suitable for individuals with epilepsy. Disclaimer: This app is for entertainment purposes. Results should not be taken seriously. --- --- --- ---

应用截屏

iPhone

entry.title: Cluedo
entry.summary:
Whispering Pines Bundle: HK$ 98.00 → HK$ 38.00
Black Adder Resort Bundle: HK$ 98.00 → HK$ 38.00
entry.content:
优惠信息

App 內購買

  • Whispering Pines Bundle：HK$ 98.00 → HK$ 38.00 [HK$ 38.00 ~ HK$ 98.00]
  • Black Adder Resort Bundle：HK$ 98.00 → HK$ 38.00 [HK$ 38.00 ~ HK$ 98.00]

全部价格信息

价格：HK$ 38.00

App 內購買

  • Ultimate Edition Upgrade：HK$ 88.00
  • Ultimate Edition Sale：HK$ 58.00
  • Welcome Offer：HK$ 148.00
  • Legacy Suspect Pack：HK$ 118.00
  • Suspects Bundle：HK$ 228.00
  • Ultimate Edition：HK$ 288.00
  • PolarStation Crime SceneBundle：HK$ 38.00
  • Whispering Pines Bundle：HK$ 38.00
  • Black Adder Resort Bundle：HK$ 38.00
  • Epic Crime Collection content：HK$ 148.00

应用描述

Join fellow detectives all over the world in the official digital board game version of Clue/Cluedo! Gather crucial evidence, interrogate suspects and solve the original murder mystery. Follow Miss Scarlett, Colonel Mustard, Professor Plum, Chef White, Solicitor Peacock and Mayor Green through the iconic Tudor Mansion, unlocking their motives and alibis as you go. Enjoy Clue/Cluedo the way you remember it in Classic Mode, or jump in for a quick game with Clue Cards mode. Alternatively, if you want to really test your sleuthing skills, try a new investigation format available exclusively to Clue/Cluedo – Ultimate Detective. In Ultimate Detective Mode, everyone answers suggestions at the same time…but secretly! Face your suspects in a direct interrogation as you rely on your skills of deduction to get to the truth. Experience the mystery, solve the murder and become a top-tier detective! HOW TO PLAY CLUE/CLUEDO: 1. Three cards are dealt face-down and set aside – this is the solution to the crime! 2. Everyone is dealt three Clue Cards. These are automatically crossed off your clue sheet, as they can’t be part of the solution. 3. Roll the dice and move around the board. 4. When you enter a room, you can make a suggestion – select who you think the murderer is, what weapon they used and where the crime happened. 5. Other players will then aim to disprove your suggestion; if one of your suggestions matches a card in their hand, they show you that card to disprove it. 6. Use your clue sheet to keep track of which characters, weapons and rooms have been disproven. 7. Think you’ve figured it out? It’s time to make an accusation! Be careful though – if you’re right, you win, but if you are wrong, you’re out! FEATURES - THE CLASSIC TUDOR MANSION – Play the beloved original board game, now rendered in stunning 3D animation and entirely ad-free! - A BRAND-NEW GAME MODE – Exclusive to the digital version of Clue/Cluedo, Ultimate Detective Mode lets you interrogate multiple characters at once. - MULTIPLE MODES – Compete against cutting-edge AI opponents that adapt to your skill level for the perfect game, or challenge detectives around the world. - ADDITIONAL ORIGINAL CONTENT – What happened after the shocking events of Tudor Mansion? Find out in a series of original new crime scenes designed specifically for the digital version of Clue/Cluedo! New characters emerge, bringing with them new clues, motives and case files to consider as you travel around the world in search of the truth. Sharpen your mind with the iconic murder-mystery board game, now available on mobile!

应用截屏

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: LumaFusion
entry.summary:
价格: HK$ 228.00 → HK$ 148.00
FCPXML Export: HK$ 148.00 → HK$ 98.00
Multicam Studio: HK$ 148.00 → HK$ 98.00
速度斜坡和關鍵幀: HK$ 148.00 → HK$ 98.00
entry.content:
优惠信息（价格：HK$ 228.00 → HK$ 148.00 [HK$ 148.00 ~ HK$ 228.00]）

App 內購買

  • FCPXML Export：HK$ 148.00 → HK$ 98.00 [HK$ 98.00 ~ HK$ 148.00]
  • Multicam Studio：HK$ 148.00 → HK$ 98.00 [HK$ 98.00 ~ HK$ 148.00]
  • 速度斜坡和關鍵幀：HK$ 148.00 → HK$ 98.00 [HK$ 98.00 ~ HK$ 148.00]

全部价格信息

价格：HK$ 148.00

App 內購買

  • 創作者通行證每月：HK$ 58.00
  • 每年創作者通行證：HK$ 488.00
  • FCPXML Export：HK$ 98.00
  • Multicam Studio：HK$ 98.00
  • 速度斜坡和關鍵幀：HK$ 98.00
  • CoreMelt PaintX Plug-In：HK$ 148.00

应用描述

LumaFusion: 影片編輯的終極敘事體驗 歡迎體驗 App Store 2021「年度最佳 App」及「編輯精選獎」的得獎 App！我們是世界各地故事創作者的專業標準，提供流暢直觀、為觸控螢幕而設計的剪輯體驗。 【專業剪輯從此簡單又輕鬆】 • 6 條影音軌 / 圖像軌道：建立多層編輯，並平滑處理 4K ProRes 和 HDR 媒體。 • 另外 6 條音軌：建立聲景。 • 終極時間軸體驗：使用全球最靈活的軌道及磁性時間軸，實現流暢編輯。 • 大量過場效果：讓您的故事持續推進。 • 在外接顯示器上顯示預覽：在大螢幕上查看。 • 加入標記、標籤和備註：計畫案保持井井有條。 • 加入旁白：在播放您的電影的同時錄製旁白。 【圖層效果、色彩校正】 • 綠幕、亮度與色度去背：運用創意來建立圖層合成。 • Lock and Load 穩定器：保持鏡頭穩定。 • 強大的色彩校正：打造您自己的風格。 • 視頻波形、向量和直方圖範圍。 • LUT 色彩檔：匯入並套用多個 .cube 或 .3dl LUT 色彩檔。 • 關鍵影格無限數量：精準製作動畫效果。 • 自訂文字和效果預設值：儲存並分享你喜歡的動畫效果和外觀。 • 網格和參考線：精確對齊元素與標題安全區域、動作安全區域和水平線。 【進階音訊控制】 • 使用圖示型等化器、參數型等化器、聲音隔離功能：完美調整音訊細節。 • 關鍵影格音訊電平、聲像、等化器：進行完美混音。 • 支援立體聲和雙單聲道音訊：適用於在單一片段中使用多個麥克風的訪談。 • 使用自動迴避：在話語期間迴避音樂，保持音訊平衡。 • 第三方音訊擴充程式：增強聲音效果。 【創意標題字幕、多層文字】 • 建立多層標題字幕：將圖形、圖像和文字加入您的圖形中。 • 自行調整字體、顏色、填充顏色、邊框和陰影：設計出引人注目的標題字幕。 • 匯入自訂字體：增強您的品牌。 • 儲存並分享標題字幕預設值：非常適合協作。 【計畫案彈性管理、媒體素材庫】 • 涵蓋所有不同需求的長寬比：包括寬銀幕電影、社群媒體影片或更多其他需求。 • 影格率範圍為 18fps-240fps：可靈活應用於任何工作流程。 • 直接編輯來自 USB-C 硬碟、「照片」App 和 Frame.io 的媒體項目：讓你隨時隨地存取媒體內容。 • 從雲端匯入媒體：自選儲存空間，沒有限制。 【分享剪輯成果】 • 控制解析度、畫質和格式： • 將電影分享至社交媒體、本地儲存或雲端儲存。 • 跨裝置剪輯：輕鬆無縫傳輸計畫案。 增強功能（可單獨購買，或作為創作者通行證訂閱的一部分獲取所有功能 - 請參見下文） • 速度調節與增強關鍵幀 - 使用這個獨一無二且易於使用的功能，創建速度調節、貝茲曲線和緩動效果。 • XML 匯出：將你的計畫案匯出到 Mac 上的 Final Cut Pro • Multicam Studio「多機工作室」：同步 6 個攝影機或音訊，點一下即可切換角度 創作者通行證訂閱 • 享用 Storyblocks for LumaFusion：數百萬首高品質免版稅音樂、音效和視頻，還可獲得上述所有增強功能。 【免費優質支援服務】 • 線上教學：www.youtube.com/@LumaTouch • 參考指南：luma-touch.com/lumafusion-reference-guide • 支援：luma-touch.com/support

应用截屏

iPad
